name: PICKLED CARROTS AND DAIKON

ingredients.item: medium carrots, peeled and shredded or cut into sticks
medium daikon radishes, shredded or cut into sticks

method: In a medium bowl, toss carrots and daikon with the salt, and then let sit for 15 minutes. Rinse well and squeeze out all excess water.
Return the carrots and daikon to the bowl, add the sugar and vinegar, and toss well. Let sit for at least 30 minutes.
Store in a 16-ounce (480 ml) sterlized glass jar (here) or airtight container for up to 2 weeks in the refrigerator.
